items.title_en: Japan’s Nikkei 225 tops 64,000 for first time as oil falls on Hormuz reopening hopes
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡油价下跌，日本日经 225 指数首次突破 64,000 点
items.desc_en: Japan’s Nikkei 225 breached 64,000 for the first time Monday as a sharp decline in oil prices lifted risk sentiment in holiday-thinned trading.
items.desc_zh: 日本日经 225 指数周一首次突破 64,000 点，因油价大幅下跌提振了假日交易清淡的风险情绪。

items.title_zh: 在债务和价格压力下，美国人陷入“根深蒂固”的财务压力

items.desc_zh: 目标是消灭附近一个 15,000 加仑的坦克，并在较小的坦克发生故障时降低其爆炸潜力。

items.title_zh: 中国科技股抵御宏观波动
items.desc_en: The China stock play right now is to focus on artificial intelligence-related names, regardless of the slower economic growth, several analysts said.
items.desc_zh: 几位分析师表示，尽管经济增长放缓，但目前中国股市的重点是人工智能相关的股票。

items.title_en: Move over, seltzer. Non-carbonated drinks are taking the spotlight
items.title_zh: 移过去，苏打水。非碳酸饮料成为人们关注的焦点
items.desc_en: Non-carbonated alcoholic drinks like Surfside and BeatBox are stealing "share of throat" from hard seltzers, particularly among Gen Z.
items.desc_zh: Surfside 和 BeatBox 等非碳酸酒精饮料正在抢走硬苏打水的“喉咙份额”，尤其是在 Z 世代中。

items.title_en: Russia hits Ukraine with hypersonic missile in one of the war's biggest attacks on Kyiv
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯用高超音速导弹袭击乌克兰，这是战争中对基辅最大规模的袭击之一

items.desc_zh: 奥列什尼克导弹射程数千公里，能够携带核弹头。

items.title_en: People trapped under collapsed building in Philippines
items.title_zh: 菲律宾民众被困倒塌建筑下
items.desc_en: A search operation has so far rescued 24 people with no deaths reported at the site, in a city near the capital Manila.
items.desc_zh: 迄今为止，搜救行动已在首都马尼拉附近的一座城市营救了 24 人，现场没有死亡报告。

items.title_en: Bolivian minister's convoy ambushed while overseeing roadblock clearance
items.title_zh: 玻利维亚部长的车队在监督清除路障时遭到伏击
items.desc_en: Security forces were met by resistance while attempting to clear highway barriers, amid unrest over the government's economic policies.
items.desc_zh: 由于政府经济政策引发的动荡，安全部队在试图清除高速公路障碍时遇到了阻力。

items.title_en: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
items.title_zh: BBC 探访中国十多年来最严重矿难现场
items.desc_en: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.
items.desc_zh: 中国六神峪矿井瓦斯爆炸已造成至少 82 人死亡。

items.title_en: The Middle East war is testing the Gulf's ambitions to become an AI hub
items.title_zh: 中东战争正在考验海湾地区成为人工智能中心的雄心
items.desc_en: Attacks on data centers in the Middle East and persistently high energy prices have altered the calculus for operators of the facilities, analysts say.
items.desc_zh: 分析人士表示，中东数据中心遭受的攻击和持续居高不下的能源价格改变了这些设施运营商的计算方式。

items.title_en: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦火车爆炸造成至少20人死亡
items.desc_en: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.
items.desc_zh: 官员们表示，这列火车在开斋节期间运送军事人员回家时遭到武装分裂分子的袭击。

items.title_en: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
items.title_zh: 男子在澳大利亚东北海岸附近的鲨鱼袭击中丧生
items.desc_en: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.
items.desc_zh: 这名39岁的男子在昆士兰州食火鸡海岸附近的浅滩游泳时受重伤身亡。

items.title_en: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
items.title_zh: 嫌疑人在白宫附近向特勤局开枪身亡
items.desc_en: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，一名嫌疑人走近大楼附近的检查站并开枪，一名旁观者受伤。

items.title_en: One dead, multiple injured after Russia launches wave of strikes on Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发动一波袭击造成一人死亡多人受伤
items.desc_en: Twenty-one people have been injured, including a 15-year-old boy, with damage reported across all districts of Kyiv.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，基辅所有地区均受到损害，共有 21 人受伤，其中包括一名 15 岁男孩。

items.title_en: Law enforcement authorities are responding to reports of shots fired near the White House
items.title_zh: 执法当局正在回应白宫附近发生枪击事件的报道
items.desc_en: Secret Service said it was "aware of reports of shots fired near 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue NW" — one block from the White House.
items.desc_zh: 特勤局表示，“已获悉在第 17 街和宾夕法尼亚大道西北附近发生枪击事件”——距白宫仅一个街区。

items.title_en: California declares state of emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic chemical leak
items.title_zh: 加州宣布进入紧急状态，消防人员竞相遏制有毒化学品泄漏
items.desc_en: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.
items.desc_zh: 由于官员警告称，一个装有约 7,000 加仑甲基丙烯酸甲酯的储罐可能会爆炸，数千人已被疏散。

items.title_en: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国红十字会志愿者死于疑似埃博拉病毒
items.desc_en: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.
items.desc_zh: 红十字会表示，他们被认为是在疫情爆发之前就感染了病毒。

items.title_en: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
items.title_zh: F1伟大的普罗斯特“因蒙面团伙袭击回家而受伤”
items.desc_en: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.
items.desc_zh: 据瑞士媒体报道，四届一级方程式世界冠军阿兰·普罗斯特在蒙面团伙袭击他位于日内瓦附近的家时受伤。

items.title_en: French pair held until trial after boys abandoned by road in Portugal
items.title_zh: 葡萄牙两名男孩被遗弃在公路上，法国夫妇被拘留直至受审
items.desc_en: The couple, who allegedly left two young boys on a roadside in the south of Portugal, will remain in custody, a court rules.
items.desc_zh: 法院裁定，这对夫妇据称将两名年幼的男孩留在葡萄牙南部的路边，目前仍将被拘留。

items.title_en: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
items.title_zh: 美国人在假期周末感受到通货膨胀的压力。这里是物价涨幅最大的地方
items.desc_en: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.
items.desc_zh: 与旅行、娱乐和食品相关的价格上涨尤其剧烈，在美国人庆祝夏季非正式开始之际，他们的钱包捉襟见肘。

items.desc_zh: macOS 的动态岛

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Here's the case for 9,000 on the S&P 500 by the middle of next year, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，到明年年中，标准普尔 500 指数将出现 9,000 点的情况
items.desc_en: Higher productivity could be even more supportive of the stock market than previously thought.
items.desc_zh: 更高的生产率可能比之前想象的更能支持股市。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。
